.. change::
    :tags: orm, typing
    :tickets: 10673

    Made :class:`_orm.declared_attr` covariant to match
    :class:`_orm.Mapped`, improving compatibility with protocols that refer
    to mapped attributes produced by declarative mixins. For mypy
    compatibility, these protocol members should be declared as read-only
    ``@property`` attributes; plain protocol variables such as
    ``id: Mapped[int | UUID]`` are interpreted by mypy as settable variables
    rather than descriptor-backed instance attributes.
